title: Erucastrum abyssinicum
taxonomy: Erucastrum abyssinicum belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This classification indicates that Erucastrum abyssinicum is closely related to other plants within this family, such as cabbage, broccoli, and mustard. Erucastrum abyssinicum is further classified as a genus within the Brassicaceae family, and its species name abyssinicum suggests its origin in Ethiopia. The genus Erucastrum is a part of the larger plant kingdom, specifically within the domain Eukaryota and the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Erucastrum abyssinicum helps to understand its evolutionary history and genetic relationships with other plants.
